title: apply_patch write guarding: per-target gate/direct-edit/reservation decisions, deny unprovable intercepted targets
action: Adapt Codex write guarding to canonical apply_patch input and supported Bash/MCP paths: parse patch targets for Add/Update/Delete/Move (multi-target, Unicode, escape and malformed rows) and run the EXISTING gate/direct-edit/reservation decisions on every target. Once an apply_patch event is intercepted, a target set that cannot be proved DENIES with a corrective message whenever gate/direct-edit/reservation policy could apply (P1 repair: no fail-open for unprovable intercepted targets). Malformed outer payloads and genuinely unsupported host paths keep D2 visible fail-open. Include a temporary-break proof: comment out one target-extraction branch, run the matrix, and record the failing row output as red_failure_evidence in this cell's verification evidence (bee_cells verify --output) naming the exact matrix row that caught it; then restore and record GREEN.

truths: every Add/Update/Delete/Move target in a multi-target patch is individually checked
an intercepted patch with unprovable targets is denied with a correction, never allowed
malformed outer hook payload remains visible fail-open, logged
existing Claude write-guard behavior is unchanged (regression rows stay green)

artifacts.substantive: patch matrix: Add/Update/Delete/Move x multi-target/Unicode/escape/malformed/gate/reservation rows + unknown-target deny row

key_links: docs/history/codex-runtime-parity/approach.md — risk map: apply_patch target extraction HIGH
prohibitions: no weakening of existing Bash/MCP write rows

trace.outcome: apply_patch write guarding now denies (exit 2) any intercepted patch whose target set cannot be fully proved -- zero Add/Update/Delete/Move/"Move to" lines parsed, or a parsed target that fails to resolve inside the repo -- with a corrective FIX message; malformed OUTER hook payloads (no canonical patch envelope at all) keep D2's visible fail-open. Fixed a real extraction bug found while building the matrix: a whitespace-only path after the verb colon previously survived as a bogus proved target instead of counting as unprovable. hooks/test_write_guard.mjs gained a 19-row apply_patch matrix (rows 8-26): every Add/Update/Delete/Move/multi-target/Unicode/space/escape/malformed/unknown-verb/gate-policy/reservation combination, each spawning the real hook process and asserting exit code + stderr shape. hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs's applypatch-unparsed-logged row (the ONE sanctioned expectation change) was retargeted from fail-open (exit 0) to deny (exit 2) -- every other existing row is untouched and still green.
trace.verify_output: test_write_guard.mjs: 47 checks incl. rows 8-26 apply_patch matrix (Add/Update/Delete/Move, multi-target, Unicode/space/escape paths, malformed bodies, unknown-verb, gate-policy, reservation rows) -> ALL PASS. test_hook_contracts.mjs: 71 rows across 11 groups, 0 failing -> ALL PASS (includes retargeted applypatch-unparsed-logged row now asserting exit 2 deny).
